## Description

Brief summary of changes. Link the related issue: Closes #XYZ

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (broken functionality)
- [ ] New checker (new environment validation)
- [ ] Enhanced existing checker (improved detection or accuracy)
- [ ] Compatibility matrix update (updated `compatibility.yaml`)
- [ ] Documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, DEBUGGING)
- [ ] CI/Testing infrastructure
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Code follows the project style (4-space indent, type hints, docstrings)
- [ ] I've added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation (README, checker docstrings, etc.)
- [ ] Commits are clean and squashed if needed
- [ ] I've tested on at least one supported OS (Ubuntu 22/24, WSL2)

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Ran full test suite
- [ ] Manual testing on:
  - [ ] Ubuntu 22.04
  - [ ] Ubuntu 24.04
  - [ ] WSL2
  - [ ] Windows native
- [ ] Tested edge cases:
  - [ ] Missing tools
  - [ ] Version mismatches
  - [ ] Network unavailable

## Related issues

Fixes #XYZ
Related to #ABC

## Notes for reviewers

Any gotchas, design decisions, or context that helps review this PR.
